_comment: Source of truth for the bootstrap element HISTORY, read by tools/fleet-drift-report.py. Each element's 'since' is the bootstrap version (client/bootstrap-winrm.ps1 $script:BootstrapVersion) that introduced it. current_version must equal max(since) AND the $script:BootstrapVersion constant. When you add a bootstrap capability: add an element with since = the new version, bump current_version here, and bump $script:BootstrapVersion in bootstrap-winrm.ps1 to match (the report warns if they drift). The report reads each unit's C:\MAST\bootstrap-manifest.json (stamped at bootstrap time) and lists elements with since > the unit's stamped version as 'may need applying'.

elements.description: Create local 'mast' admin account with the provisioning password
Winlogon AutoAdminLogon for headless unattended sign-in
Ensure IPv4 uses DHCP (the fleet identifies units by hostname)
WinRM over HTTP 5985 + Basic auth, firewall port open, network profile Private
Diagnostic data = Security; disable DiagTrack/dmwappushservice, advertising ID, activity feed, Cortana/web search
Regional format English (United States), system + per-user
Disable Windows Firewall on all profiles (units sit on an isolated VLAN)
Stop + disable non-essential vendor services (Spooler, Search, Intel LMS, vendor helpers)
